summary: Unit tests cover core assignLabels logic and priority resolution adequately, but globToRegExp is only tested indirectly and CLI is untested. Workflow tests validate structure and run 3 cases through act, but depend on unshown workflow implementation that must produce FINAL_LABELS output (implementation shows only LABELS: stderr output, creating potential test failure). Edge case coverage is weak: no glob pattern boundary tests (*, ?, **, escaped chars, multiple wildcards), no priority tie-breaking verification, no stdin input testing for CLI, no malformed JSON error scenarios. Setup/teardown is good but test organization could document assumptions better.
